title: Accounts Payable Specialist
description: Johnson & Johnson is seeking an Accounts Payable Specialist for our Irvine operations. You'll manage vendor payments, reconcile accounts, and ensure timely processing of invoices for our global Consumer Health division. This hybrid role offers exposure to large-scale financial operations and the chance to develop expertise in accounts payable management.
responsibilities: Process and verify vendor invoices; reconcile to purchase orders and receiving reports
Prepare and process payment runs using accounts payable software
Manage vendor relationships, resolve payment discrepancies, and maintain vendor files
Perform account reconciliations and investigate variances
Prepare accounts payable reports and analysis for management review

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field
skills: Proficiency with accounting software and ERP systems
Strong Excel skills for financial analysis
Excellent organizational and attention to detail
Ability to work independently and meet deadlines

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
Hybrid work flexibility with 3 days onsite
